optionality_threshold_or_rule.boundary_integrity_floor_value: maintenance basin node set and topology signature preserved

optionality_window.window_role: same source-current availability window; no deterministic replay or stress validation yet

replay_result.not_run_reason: I5 opens the first source-current optional set; replay/control-backed AB4+ evidence remains I6 scope

threshold_record.boundary_integrity_floor_value: maintenance basin node set and topology signature preserved

same_basin_continuation_rule.allowed_drift: optional branches may open only while maintenance basin remains above floor
same_basin_continuation_rule.boundary_integrity_floor: boundary remains coherent while optional branches are open
same_basin_continuation_rule.flux_balance_bounds: optional branch flux cannot drain maintenance support below floor
same_basin_continuation_rule.replay_requirement: surplus and optional branch set replay under same budget surface

surplus_threshold_or_rule.boundary_integrity_floor_value: maintenance basin node set and topology signature preserved

checks.detail: provisional source-current AB3 optional continuation candidate pending replay/control matrix; reward maximization, semantic choice, agency, native support, sentience, Phase 8, and ant ecology remain blocked

fixture_reuse_audit.interpretation: N24 I5 re-emits the same LGRC fixture state through its own runtime artifact; the N23 snapshot is compared only to audit fixture reuse and is not consumed as N24 optionality evidence.

geometric_interpretation.availability_vs_admissibility: I5 supports availability, not stress-backed joint admissibility. jointly_admissible_optional_continuation_count remains 0 until stress/threshold validation.
geometric_interpretation.claim_boundary: This supports only provisional AB3 source-current optional continuation evidence. AB4+ requires I6 replay/control validation; AB5+ requires later stress/threshold evidence.
geometric_interpretation.control_field_semantics: surplus_without_optional_continuation_rejected_or_demoted=true means the surplus-without-optionality control is satisfied because the bad condition is absent in I5; the field name is inherited from the frozen row schema.
geometric_interpretation.optionality: The optionality is geometric rather than semantic: the branch records are LGRC center-to-neighbor edge continuations in the same runtime snapshot, with branch-specific support/coherence and boundary/flux traces.
geometric_interpretation.persistence_boundary: surplus_persistence_ratio and optional_branch_persistence_ratio are single-window descriptive placeholders, not replay-backed persistence evidence.
geometric_interpretation.short_read: I5 records three source-current available continuations inside one optionality window while the maintenance basin remains above support/coherence floors.

inherited_n23_context.consumption_boundary: local AP4 bridge context for branch-conditioned optionality; not final global AP4

purpose: produce source-current optional continuation set evidence while maintenance floors hold

source_digest_chain_audit.digest_chain_interpretation: I5 consumes the current repo I2/I3/I4 output digests; regenerate I4/I5 after any I2 or I3 schema change.
